error_signature: Bad Request: bad webhook: An HTTPS URL must be provided for webhook
title: Telegram Trigger requires HTTPS webhook URL
symptom: When executing a workflow with a Telegram trigger, n8n returns a 'Bad Request: bad webhook' error indicating that an HTTPS URL must be provided for the webhook.
applies_when: n8n is behind a reverse proxy
not_this_if: Webhook URL is correctly set to HTTPS
n8n is not behind a reverse proxy
root_cause: The Telegram trigger requires a publicly accessible HTTPS URL for webhooks. If n8n is running behind a reverse proxy and the environment variables are not set correctly, it may default to using a localhost URL instead of the public domain.
fix_steps: Ensure the environment variables are correctly set for n8n
Restart n8n using 'sudo pm2 restart n8n --update-env' to apply changes
agent_instruction: Set the correct environment variables and restart n8n to ensure the webhook URL is updated.
